commands.summary: Open/start flow passed: open reaches Ready, start from Ready reaches Starting, resume from Ready rejects InvalidState.

tests_covered: open with source_id creates graph resources and reaches Ready
start from Ready accepts and enters Starting
resume from Ready rejects InvalidState, proving start is not resume
no public play API remains present from P7B signature lock
invalid source open returns typed SourceOpenFailed
allowed_operations_checked: Implemented command acceptance path and dispatch for open/start/pause/resume/seek/track-switch/close/system-event public facade
design_corrections: P7C does not perform same-track no-op for track switching because the public P7B request currently carries target track id only, not current track context. Same-track no-op must close in P7E when the coordinator owns current track state.
